summary: Cleaned up function declarations and related header lint issues by removing broad or duplicate prototypes from include/functions.h and baselib headers, moving a Master Hand-specific prototype into ftMasterHand.h, marking file-local declarations static, replacing a local Vec3 typedef hack in stage.h with Vec, and updating one fighter global field name use.
what_changed: Removed many function declarations from include/functions.h, including HSD_DObjLoadDesc, HSD_MObjLoadDesc, HSD_AObjRemove, HSD_LObjGetPositionWObj, HSD_LObjGetInterestWObj, HSD_GXInit, HSD_OSInit, HSD_ObjInit, HSD_RObjRemoveAnimAll, HSD_RObjReqAnimAll, and func_8015364C.
Moved func_8015364C(struct _HSD_GObj *, struct _HSD_JObj *, f32, f32) from the global include/functions.h bucket into src/melee/ft/chara/ftMasterHand/ftMasterHand.h.

Added typedef forward declarations for GObjUnkStruct and GObjFuncs in include/sysdolphin/baselib/gobj.h, then used those typedef names in func_803912A8 instead of spelling struct _GObjUnkStruct and struct _GObjFuncs directly.

Removed internal or duplicate-looking declarations MObjUpdateFunc and MObjLoad from include/sysdolphin/baselib/mobj.h while keeping public HSD_MObj declarations such as HSD_MObjLoadDesc and HSD_MObjAlloc.
Changed local forward declarations __GXSetGenMode in GXGeometry.c and WObjInfoInit in wobj.c from external declarations to static declarations.
Removed the conditional M2CTX-only typedef alias typedef Vec Vec3 from src/melee/gr/stage.h and changed StageInfo members from Vec3 to Vec.
Updated ftcoll.c to use lbl_804D782C->x20_fighters instead of lbl_804D782C->x20_fighterGObj.
smart_moves: Reduced dependence on the broad include/functions.h catch-all by placing a fighter-specific declaration in the relevant Master Hand header.
Used static for C-file-local declarations, which documents internal linkage and prevents accidentally exporting helper symbols through declarations.
Deleted a header-local Vec3 compatibility alias guarded by M2CTX and used the underlying Dolphin Vec type directly in StageInfo, avoiding a special-case typedef in a shared header.
Introduced typedef forward declarations in gobj.h so prototypes can use project-style type names without requiring full struct definitions.
decomp_lessons: Prefer subsystem or character headers for prototypes over the global include/functions.h sink when a function has a clear owner.
If a function is only declared and used within one translation unit, declare it static in that C file rather than giving it external linkage.
Avoid local typedef hacks in headers when the canonical SDK or project type is already available; here StageInfo could use Vec directly instead of Vec3.
Forward typedefs can keep headers lightweight while making function signatures cleaner and more consistent.
Lint-only PRs can still improve decomp maintainability by narrowing prototype scope, clarifying linkage, and removing stale declarations.
naming_conventions: Use HSD_* typedef names where available for baselib types, but forward-declare typedef aliases when only incomplete struct types are needed.
Use Dolphin Vec directly in stage structures rather than a local Vec3 alias in stage.h.
The field name x20_fighters replaced x20_fighterGObj in ftcoll.c, suggesting the global entity list field should be named by collection role rather than one object instance.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly matching tactic was directly evidenced beyond declaration/linkage cleanup.
Marking local helper declarations static can help keep C linkage consistent with intended translation-unit scope without changing generated code intent.
Moving prototypes to narrower headers can reduce accidental dependency masking during future matching work.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: Asked whether Vec3 was gone everywhere after the stage.h change from Vec3 to Vec.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.comment: Clarified that Vec3 was only removed in this header to get rid of the unusual #ifndef M2CTX typedef block.

follow_up_queries: Find remaining uses of Vec3 or M2CTX typedef guards in headers.
Audit include/functions.h for prototypes that can move into subsystem-specific headers.
Search for non-static forward declarations in C files that refer to file-local functions.
Check whether removed mobj.h declarations have proper private declarations near their definitions if still needed.
